name: IdsEdwMbrMcareSecExcptDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MAIN AS (SELECT MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_SK AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_ID, SUBSTRING(MBR_ATCHMT.ATCHMT_DT_TX_1, 1, 10) AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_DEST_ID_DTM, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_SK, MBR_ATCHMT.ATCHMT_DT_TX_2 AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX_2, MBR_ATCHMT.LAST_UPDT_DTM AS MBR_ATCHMT_LAST_UPDT_DTM, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_DESC AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_DESC, MBR_ATCHMT.ATCHMT_DT_TX_1 AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SRVY_DT_SK, MBR_ATCHMT.ATCHMT_DT_TX_2 AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXSRVY_END_DT_SK, SUBSTRING(MBR_ATCHMT.ATCHMT_DT_TX_1, 9, 2) AS SRVY_2_DGT_YR, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_ATCHMT MBR_ATCHMT LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON MBR_ATCHMT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_SK <> 0 AND MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_SK <> 1 AND LEFT(dbo.trim_default(MBR_ATCHMT.MBR_ATCHMT_ID), 3) = 'SEE'), NARow AS (SELECT 1 AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 1 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, 'NA' AS MBR_ATCHMT_ID, 'NA' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX, '1753-01-01 00:00:00' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DEST_ID_DTM, 1 AS MBR_ATCHMT_SEQ_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS MBR_SK, 'NA' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX_2, '1753-01-01 00:00:00' AS MBR_ATCHMT_LAST_UPDT_DTM, 'NA' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_DESC, 'NA' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SRVY_DT_SK, 'NA' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXSRVY_END_DT_SK, 'NA' AS SRVY_2_DGT_YR, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 1 AS MBR_ATCHMT_SK), UNKRow AS (SELECT 0 AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, 'UNK' AS MBR_ATCHMT_ID, 'UNK' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX, '1753-01-01 00:00:00' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DEST_ID_DTM, 0 AS MBR_ATCHMT_SEQ_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS MBR_SK, 'UNK' AS MBR_ATCHMT_DT_TX_2, '1753-01-01 00:00:00' AS MBR_ATCHMT_LAST_UPDT_DTM, 'UNK' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_DESC, 'UNK' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXCPT_SRVY_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS MBR_MCARE_SEC_EXSRVY_END_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRVY_2_DGT_YR, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS MBR_ATCHMT_SK) SELECT * FROM MAIN UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NARow UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNKRow
